description: Style Notenew hide comes up with this item du jour - just right to add a new season twist to your off-duty wardrobe. Style this belt with tonal shoes (no sports shoes please!) to get the look just right.Product DetailsReversible belt, black on one side and brown on the otherTang clasp with a single prong buckle, has holes to customise the FitTwist-and-turn buckle to change belt sidesMaterial and careLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
